news.t: Why these ‘Trump trade' ETF winners are fading — and what it says about the financial markets
Vanguard Announces Share Splits for Six Equity ETFs
Small-cap ETFs keep the rally going
The Implied Vanguard S&P Small-Cap 600 ETF Analyst Target Price: $161

holdings.infoBox: VIOO is an equity ETF with a total of 608 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sanmina stock at 0.83%, Semtech at 0.83%, Viavi Solutions at 0.66%, Viasat at 0.64%, and Lumen Technologies at 0.61%.

overview.description: The Vanguard S&P Small-Cap 600 ETF (VIOO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 index, a market-cap-weighted index of 600 small-cap US stocks selected by an S&P Committee. VIOO was launched on Sep 7, 2010 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: Why these ‘Trump trade' ETF winners are fading — and what it says about the financial markets
data.text: The postelection stock-market rally has started to fade as investors fret over how long the honeymoon could last.

data.title: Vanguard Announces Share Splits for Six Equity ETFs
data.text: VALLEY FORGE, Pa. , Feb. 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Vanguard today announced plans to execute forward share splits for six equity ETFs.

data.title: Small-cap ETFs keep the rally going
data.text: Small-cap exchange-traded funds surged on Thursday, extending a winning streak that's lasted several months. Small-cap funds with a growth tilt were the big winners: the iShares Morningstar Small-Cap ...

data.title: The Implied Vanguard S&P Small-Cap 600 ETF Analyst Target Price: $161
data.text: For the Vanguard S&P Small-Cap 600 ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $161.34 per unit.
